# Claude API Pricing

The Claude API is billed per million input and output tokens. Pricing varies by
model: Claude Opus is the most capable and most expensive, Claude Sonnet
balances capability and cost, and Claude Haiku is optimized for speed and low
cost. See your Anthropic Console for live per-token rates.
